name: Return Inside Finally Block
description: The code contains a return statement inside a finally block, which causes any thrown exception from the try block to be silently discarded. This can mask errors, hide security-relevant exceptions, and lead to incorrect program state.
detection_pattern: CONTROL node representing a try-finally block where the finally block contains a return statement. Look for EGRESS (return) nodes within finally CONTROL blocks that would suppress exceptions from the corresponding try block.
